nodes.label: AI as helper for mundane tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacer of human creativity
nodes.grounding_span: AI should truly just be helper and never a replacer

nodes.label: AI as sounding board for ideas
nodes.grounding_span: I think of the AI as if I'm talking to a writing partner

nodes.label: AI assistance for weak points in writing
nodes.grounding_span: My weakest points are the middle of the novel

nodes.label: AI as source of unique details
nodes.label_negative: AI providing generic or fully fleshed-out concepts
nodes.grounding_span: I mostly like to get unique details rather than fully fleshed-out concepts

nodes.label: Maintaining creative control
nodes.grounding_span: I'm always driving the creative decisions. I never relinquish that hold

nodes.label: AI preserving uniqueness of self
nodes.grounding_span: I want to make sure I retain the uniqueness of self

nodes.label: Creative flow and momentum
nodes.grounding_span: It feels really good to keep a steady writing pace

nodes.label: Human artistic expression
nodes.grounding_span: our greatest strength as a species is art

nodes.label: Personal creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I'm always driving the creative decisions

nodes.label: Positive view of AI as idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: It felt great to have ideas to pick from instead of sitting around trying to do the grunt work myself

nodes.label: Concern about AI replacing human creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I have a lot of concerns. I think AI should truly just be helper and never a replacer

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for maintaining writing pace
nodes.grounding_span: It feels really good to keep a steady writing pace

nodes.label: Ambivalence about AI's future role
nodes.grounding_span: It's hard for me envision AI doing anymore for me than it's doing now

nodes.label: Intuitive non-linear writing process
nodes.grounding_span: I don't outline and I also don't write in order

nodes.label: Goal-oriented creative approach
nodes.grounding_span: I make sure that I have a goal to shoot towards with every scene that I write
